G

Deploy to Puter

Push Grudge Studio Arena to Puter hosting

How Puter Deployment Works:
1. Select your build folder (usually dist/)
2. All files are uploaded to Puter's cloud filesystem
3. A subdomain is created pointing to your files
4. Your app is live at yourname.puter.site

Upload Build Files

Drag & drop your dist folder here

Or click to select files
